eyebrow.zh: 开源 · 全本地 · 手机审批
eyebrow.en: Open source · Fully local · Phone approvals

headline.zh:
几个 Agent 同时停下问你
全收进手机一个队列
headline.en:
Several agents stop and ask at once
— all into one phone queue

sub.zh: 它把每个 Agent 的审批提示聚拢成手机上一个按先后排好的队列，一次只放一个——扫码就能在手机上逐条答复，不用再 alt-tab 找哪个 Agent 在等你。
sub.en: It gathers every agent's approval prompts into one ordered queue on your phone, one at a time — scan a QR and answer them from your phone, no more alt-tabbing to find which agent is waiting.

title.zh: 几个 Agent 抢着问 → 手机排一条队
title.en: Several agents asking at once → one phone queue

body.zh: 四个终端里的 Agent 不再各自打断你——所有审批提示聚拢成手机上一个按先后排好的队列，一次只放一个，每条标着是哪个 Agent，扫一眼就知道该回答谁。
body.en: Four agents in four terminals stop interrupting you one at a time — every prompt gathers into one ordered queue on your phone, one at a time, each tagged with which agent, so a glance tells you who to answer.

title.zh: 认得你用的每一个 Agent

body.zh: Claude Code 的方括号提示、Cursor 和 Aider 的 (Y)es/(N)o 提示，它都认得——不用为换个 Agent 就重学一遍；想接新 Agent，加个适配就行。
body.en: Claude Code's bracket prompts, Cursor and Aider's (Y)es/(N)o dialect — it understands all of them, so switching agents doesn't mean relearning; adding a new one is just one adapter.

title.zh: 开放协议，谁都能接进来
title.en: Open protocol — any tool can plug in

body.zh: 运行中的它会公开审批请求的格式约定——任何 Agent 运行时照着校验自己的输出，就能直接把审批塞进你手机上的同一个队列，不必非得让它去拦终端。
body.en: While running, it publishes the approval request format openly — any agent runtime can validate its own output against it and post approvals straight into the same queue on your phone, without scraping your terminal.

title.en: Approvals stay on your machine — no cloud

body.zh: 所有进程都跑在你自己的机器上：扫个码就能在手机上审批，审批记录也留在本机——没有 Docker、没有云服务、没有外部数据库。
body.en: Every process runs on your own machine: scan a QR to approve from your phone, with records staying on your machine — no Docker, no cloud service, no external database.

headline.zh: 别再 alt-tab 找你的 Agent
headline.en: Stop alt-tabbing to find your agents

sub.zh: 一条命令装上，扫个码，审批就都在手机上了。Apache-2.0 开源，全程本地。
sub.en: One command to install, one QR to scan, and every approval lives on your phone. Apache-2.0 licensed, fully local.

tag.zh: Apache-2.0 开源 · 全程本地
